channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SUGSLLOYD] Sugs Lloyd Secures ₹639 Crore Mega Order, Boosting Scale and Revenue Visibility
item.description:
🔥 Trending

SUGS Lloyd Limited, a leading EPC company in Power T&D, solar, and smart grid solutions, has secured a major order worth ₹639.24 crore (including GST) from Konkan Railway Corporation Limited. The project involves Supply, Installation, Testing and Commissioning of Plant Contract along with SCADA-DMS systems, to be executed over a period of 24 months. This order significantly enhances the company's order book and provides strong multi-year revenue visibility. It also marks a strategic expansion in the Company’s Power Transmission and Distribution business, further diversifying its project portfolio and strengthening its positioning with marquee government clients.

  • SUGS Lloyd secures a major order worth ₹639.24 crore from Konkan Railway Corporation Limited
  • The project involves Supply, Installation, Testing and Commissioning of Plant Contract along with SCADA-DMS systems
  • The order significantly enhances the company's order book and provides strong multi-year revenue visibility
  • It marks a strategic expansion in the Company’s Power Transmission and Distribution business
  • The order further diversifies SUGS Lloyd’s project portfolio and strengthens its positioning with marquee government clients

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sugs Lloyd Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [DMR] DMR Engineering Secures Rs. 1.65 Crore Work Order for Ralam Simpu Udiyar Hydroelectric Project
item.description:
🔥 Trending

DMR Engineering Ltd. has received a work order for the preparation of a Detailed Project Report (DPR) and providing Design and Engineering Consultancy Services for the Ralam Simpu Udiyar Hydroelectric Project, located in Uttarakhand, India. The contract is worth Rs. 1,25,00,000 (Rupees One Crore Twenty-Five Lakh only), exclusive of GST, and is to be executed over 24 months. Additionally, DMR may provide optional Hydro-Mechanical and Electro-Mechanical services worth Rs. 40,00,000 (Rupees Forty Lakh only).

  • DMR Engineering secured a work order for the Ralam Simpu Udiyar Hydroelectric Project worth Rs. 1.65 Crore
  • The contract involves preparing a DPR and providing Design and Engineering Consultancy Services
  • The project is located in Uttarakhand, India and has a duration of 24 months
  • Optional Hydro-Mechanical and Electro-Mechanical services are included in the contract
  • The order was awarded by a domestic entity, Him Urja Private Limited

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DMR Hydroengineering & Infrastructures Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [DMR] DMR Engineering Receives Work Order for Detailed Project Report of Sainachatti Kuthnaur Hydroelectric Project
item.description:
DMR Engineering Ltd. has received a work order for the preparation of a Detailed Project Report (DPR) and providing Design and Engineering Consultancy Services for the Sainachatti Kuthnaur Hydroelectric Project (24 MW) in Uttarakhand, India. The contract is worth Rs.1,25,00,000 (Rupees One Crore Twenty-Five Lakh only), exclusive of GST, and is to be executed over 24 months. The scope also includes optional Hydro-Mechanical and Electro-Mechanical works, amounting to Rs. 40,00,000 (Rupees Forty Lakh only).

  • DMR Engineering received a work order for the Sainachatti Kuthnaur Hydroelectric Project worth Rs.1,25,00,000
  • The contract is to be executed over 24 months
  • Optional Hydro-Mechanical and Electro-Mechanical works worth Rs. 40,00,000 included
  • Project located in Uttarakhand, India
  • Contract includes Design and Engineering Consultancy Services

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DMR Hydroengineering & Infrastructures Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [NAUKRI] Info Edge (India) Ltd. Appoints Sudeep Shrivastava as Senior Vice President and Head Legal
item.description:
Info Edge (India) Ltd. has appointed Mr. Sudeep Shrivastava as Senior Vice President and Head Legal and Senior Management Personnel, with effect from March 23, 2026. Mr. Shrivastava is a seasoned legal professional with around 14 years of experience in diverse industries and countries. He has held legal roles at Bharti Infratel Limited, Reliance Jio Limited, Vodafone Mobile Services Limited, and Myntra Jabong Private Limited. He served as Senior Director Legal for TaskUs India Pvt. Ltd. overseeing legal support for operations across multiple jurisdictions including India, South East Asia, and growth regions. He holds a B.A LL.B with honours from National Law University, Lucknow.

  • Appointment of Mr. Sudeep Shrivastava as Senior Vice President and Head Legal and Senior Management Personnel
  • Mr. Shrivastava has around 14 years of experience in diverse industries and countries
  • He has held legal roles at Bharti Infratel Limited, Reliance Jio Limited, Vodafone Mobile Services Limited, and Myntra Jabong Private Limited
  • He served as Senior Director Legal for TaskUs India Pvt. Ltd.
  • Mr. Shrivastava holds a B.A LL.B with honours from National Law University, Lucknow

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INFO EDGE (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [YASHPAKKA] Trading Window Closure Announced by Pakka Ltd. for Q4 and FY Ending on 31st March, 2026
item.description:
Pakka Ltd. has announced the closure of the trading window for all designated persons and their immediate relatives, effective from 1st April, 2026. The closure is in compliance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the Company’s Code of Conduct. The trading window will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration and dissemination of the Audited Financial Results for the fourth quarter and financial year ending on 31st March, 2026. The date of the Board of Directors' meeting for the consideration and approval of the Audited Financial Results will be intimated to the Stock Exchanges separately.

  • Trading window closure for designated persons and their immediate relatives from 1st April, 2026
  • Closure in compliance with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Trading window to remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration and dissemination of Q4 and FY results
  • Date of Board of Directors' meeting for approval of Audited Financial Results to be announced separately

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Yash Pakka Ltd-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BEDMUTHA] Bedmutha Industries Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure for Designated Persons
item.description:
Bedmutha Industries Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for all designated persons, including directors, and their dependents. The closure is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, and the company’s Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Trading by Designated Persons. The trading window will be closed from April 01, 2026, till 48 hours after the announcement/declaration of the Audited Financial Results of the Company for the Quarter and Year ending March 31, 2026. The information has been hosted on the company's website.

  • Bedmutha Industries Ltd announces trading window closure for designated persons and their dependents.
  • The closure is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.
  • The trading window will be closed from April 01, 2026, till 48 hours after the announcement/declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the Quarter and Year ending March 31, 2026.
  • The information has been hosted on the company's website.
  • The trading window closure is a measure to regulate, monitor, and report trading by designated persons.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BEDMUTHA INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Trading Window Closure

item.title: [GOACARBON] Goa Carbon Ltd's Paradeep Unit Temporarily Shut Down for Maintenance
item.description:
Goa Carbon Limited has announced the temporary shut-down of its Paradeep Unit for scheduled maintenance work. The unit, located at Vill. Udayabata, Paradeepgarh, Dist. Jagatsinghpur, Odisha, has ceased operations from 22nd March 2026.

  • Goa Carbon Limited's Paradeep Unit is temporarily shut down
  • The shut-down is due to scheduled maintenance work
  • The unit is located at Vill. Udayabata, Paradeepgarh, Dist. Jagatsinghpur, Odisha
  • The maintenance work started from 22nd March 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GOA CARBON LTD.-$ | Category: Business Update

item.title: [KIRLOSIND] Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Resumes Operations of High Pressure Moulding Line After Middle East Conflict Disruptions
item.description:
Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited (KFIL), a listed material subsidiary of Kirloskar Industries Ltd, has resumed the operations of one of the two High Pressure Moulding Lines situated at Solapur plant. The resumption follows the disruptions in global energy supply chains linked to the Middle East conflict which led to non-availability of Liquefied Petroleum Gas. KFIL has managed to resume the operations by using alternate fuel. The temporary stoppage of operations did not have any material financial impact.

  • Kirloskar Ferrous Industries Limited (KFIL) resumes operations of one High Pressure Moulding Line at Solapur plant.
  • Resumption follows disruptions in global energy supply chains linked to the Middle East conflict.
  • KFIL uses alternate fuel to resume operations.
  • Temporary stoppage of operations did not have any material financial impact.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kirloskar Industries Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [MMFL] MM Forgings Ltd. to Raise Funds and Increase Authorized Share Capital
item.description:
MM Forgings Ltd. has announced the closure of its trading window in accordance with Regulation 29 of the SEBI Listing (Obligations and Disclosure Requirement) Regulations, 2015. The Board of Directors will meet on 25 March 2026 to consider and approve the raising of funds through Qualified Institutional Placement (QIP) or other eligible securities. The company also plans to increase its authorized share capital, subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals. The trading window will reopen 48 hours after the conclusion of the Board Meeting. This information is hosted on the company's website at www.mmforgings.com.

  • MM Forgings Ltd. to raise funds through Qualified Institutional Placement (QIP) or other eligible securities
  • Company plans to increase its authorized share capital
  • Trading window closure with immediate effect
  • Trading window to reopen 48 hours after the Board Meeting
  • Approval of shareholders and regulatory authorities required

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: M.M.FORGINGS LTD.-$ | Category: Investment

item.title: [MMFL] MM Forgings Ltd. to Consider Funds Raising via QIP and Authorized Share Capital Increase
item.description:
MM Forgings Ltd. has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on 25 March 2026 to consider raising funds through the issuance of equity shares or other eligible securities, including Qualified Institutional Placement (QIP), subject to necessary approvals. The company will also seek shareholder approval for increasing the authorized share capital and altering the Memorandum of Association and/or Articles of Association. The Trading Window for dealing in the securities of the company will be closed with immediate effect, in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.

  • MM Forgings Ltd. to consider raising funds through QIP
  • Company to increase authorized share capital
  • Shareholder approval sought for proposed changes
  • Trading Window closed in accordance with SEBI regulations

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: M.M.FORGINGS LTD.-$ | Category: Investment
